hero.subtitle: ₹20 NFC کارڈ — جب آپ بول نہیں سکتے تب کام کرتا ہے۔ کوئی بھی راہگیر اپنے فون سے ٹیپ کرے — فوراً آپ کا بلڈ گروپ، الرجی دیکھے اور خاندان کو مطلع کرے۔ ایپ کی ضرورت نہیں۔

testimonials.title: What People Think
testimonials.subtitle: Feedback on our emergency health identity concept
testimonials.story1Quote: As a college student who rides a bike every day, the concept of a ₹20 card that holds emergency health details and offline alerts is a game-changer. It's affordable and can actually save lives. Can't wait to order one!
testimonials.story2Quote: As a physiotherapist, I see people with sports injuries and sudden physical crises daily. An offline NFC card/wristband containing vital medical details and contacts is a brilliant concept for anyone with an active lifestyle.
testimonials.story3Quote: My elderly parents live in another city, and I constantly worry about their safety. A tap-to-read emergency card that doesn't need any app or internet setup is the most practical solution I've seen. This idea is highly needed.
testimonials.story4Quote: The idea of using cheap, accessible NFC cards to create emergency health IDs for everyone in India is incredibly promising. It bypasses internet barriers entirely. If this scales, it will redefine emergency response.

cta.title: 2 منٹ میں اپنا SwasthyaTap کارڈ حاصل کریں

cta.step5: کارڈ بھیجا جاتا ہے / خود پروگرام
